features: [Target Stubborn Spots And Breakouts] Contains 10% Azelaic Acid to effectively fade the look of post-blemish dark spots. This solution refines uneven texture and bumps without irritation.

[Gentle Hydration For Sensitive Skin] Formulated with 3 types of Hyaluronic Acid and Panthenol to deeply hydrate. The lightweight, watery texture absorbs fast, making it easy to layer without drying out the skin.

[Natural Green Redness Relief] Powered by the Anua Gentle Calming Complex including Cica and Blue Tansy Oil. The naturally derived green tint helps instantly soothe irritated skin and redness with no artificial fragrance.
[Clinically Proven Non-Comedogenic Formula] Tested to Immediate(temporary) calm after use, proving to be non-comedogenic.

[How to Use] Start with 1-2 drops per use to begin with gradually increasing to up to 5 drops. Please start slow by using 1-2 times a week and gradually increase to twice daily, always finishing with sunscreen for daytime use.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: CAUTIONS 1. If you experience any unexpected symptoms or side effects, such as red rashes, swelling, or itching, due to direct sunlight when using or after using cosmetics, consult a doctor. 2. Refrain from using it on such areas like wounds, etc. 3. Precautions for storage and handling a) Keep out of reach of children. b) Store away from direct sunlight. 4. Rinse with water when it gets into your eyes.
